title.v: chứng từ thanh toán đầu kỳ cho các hóa đơn

command.text: declare @baseCurrency varchar(32), @baseCurrencyName nvarchar(128), @unitName nvarchar(1023) select @baseCurrency = rtrim(val) from options where name = 'm_ma_nt0' select @baseCurrencyName = case when @@language = 'v' then rtrim(ten_nt) else rtrim(ten_nt2) end from dmnt where ma_nt = @baseCurrency select @unitName = case when @@language = 'v' then ten_dvcs else ten_dvcs2 end from dmdvcs where ma_dvcs = @@unit select 'this._baseCurrency=''' + @baseCurrency + ''';this._baseCurrencyName=''' + @baseCurrencyName + ''';this._unitCode=''' + @@unit + ''';this._unitName=''' + replace(replace(isnull(@unitName, ''), '\', '\\'), '''', '\''') + '''; activeForm(this);' as message return
if exists(select 1 from @@table where stt_rec = @stt_rec and ma_nt = '') begin select rtrim(val) as ma_nt, 1 as ty_gia from options where name = 'm_ma_nt0' return end

&UpdateConflict;
declare @$recordHasBeenChanged nvarchar(512), @$deleteConflict nvarchar(512) select @$recordHasBeenChanged = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Bản ghi hiện thời đã được sửa hoặc xóa bởi người sử dụng khác.' else N'This item has been modified or deleted by another user.' end select @$deleteConflict = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Chứng từ đã được phân bổ, không thể xóa được.' else N'Can not delete this voucher, It was distributed.' end

declare @@master nvarchar(32) select @@master = '@@table' select @so_ct = space(datalength(@so_ct) - len(rtrim(@so_ct))) + @so_ct &CommandGetIdentityNumber; select @ma_ct = @@id, @loai_ct = '2', @t_tien_pb_nt0 = @t_tien_pb_nt, @t_tien_pb0 = @t_tien_pb, @datetime0 = getdate(), @datetime2 = getdate(), @user_id0 = @@userID, @user_id2 = @@userID

select @so_ct = space(datalength(@so_ct) - len(rtrim(@so_ct))) + @so_ct if not exists(select * from @@table where stt_rec = @stt_rec) begin select @$recordHasBeenChanged as message return end if exists(select 1 from cttt20 where loai_tt = 1 and stt_rec = @stt_rec) begin select @$updateConflict as message return end
update @@table set datetime2 = getdate(), user_id2 = @@userID where stt_rec = @stt_rec &Post;

action.text: if exists(select 1 from dmkh where ma_kh = @ma_kh and kh_yn = 1) begin select case when b.loai_tk = 1 and b.tk_cn = 1 then rtrim(a.tk) else '' end as tk, b.ten_tk%l from dmkh a left join dmtk b on a.tk = b.tk where a.ma_kh = @ma_kh return end
